revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}||[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter…'
revision.text:
{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}||[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]}}|}}|[[Category:{{{1}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}}}<noinclude> *This adds a category or dated category to an article space page only. *It will add it to an optional additional category. *If the dated cat is invalid it will add it to [[:Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
Syntax
*Parameter 1: Default category name *Parameter 2: Preposition (from, since, as at, as of) *Parameter 3: Date (Month Year, e.g. {{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}) usually the "date" parameter of the calling template *Parameter 4: All inclusive category name - e.g. All articles containing weasel words *Parameter 5: Alternative default category (overrides 1 which is then only used to construct the dated category if it exists)
==Note== Even if the constructed dated category doesn't exist it is still used. This enables more rapid fault finding.
==See also== {{Tl|DMC}} </noinclude>
Swine flu is caused by having sex with pigs

revision.comment: [[WP:RBK|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Ihateswineflu1|Ihateswineflu1]] ([[User talk:Ihateswineflu1|talk]]) to last version by Rich Farmbrough
moved [[Template:DMCA]] to [[Template:Dated maintenance category]]: more descriptive name, and merging with [[Template:DMC]]
per request on talk page, please revert if this causes a problem. Thanks!

Changed protection level of Template:Dated maintenance category: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: allowing template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indef
If not categorising, output a space instead of nothing to prevent unwanted blank lines; see edit request on talk page
Second attempt. Those spaces upset inline templates such as {{As of}}. Instead, try an unconditional <nowiki/>
revision.text:
<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--
-->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]<!--
-->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    |<!--
 -->|[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]<!--
-->}}
  |[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}<!--
            -->|{{{1}}}<!--
           -->}}]]<!--
-->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--
-->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]<!--
-->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    |<!--
 -->|[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]<!--
-->}}
  |[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}<!--
            -->|{{{1}}}<!--
           -->}}]]<!--
-->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--
-->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |<!--
-->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    |<!--
 -->|<!--
-->}}
  |<!--
-->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

{{draft categories|
[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]
[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}<!--
            -->|{{{1}}}<!--
           -->}}]]
[[Category:{{{4}}}]]
}}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--
-->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]<!--
-->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    |<!--
 -->|[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]<!--
-->}}
  |[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}<!--
            -->|{{{1}}}<!--
           -->}}]]<!--
-->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: lets hope this fixes it since the qq=draft was showing up
revision.text:
<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--
-->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]<!--
-->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    |<!--
 -->|[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]<!--
-->}}
  |[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}<!--
            -->|{{{1}}}<!--
           -->}}]]<!--
-->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 18:55:42 on [[Template:Dated maintenance category]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}||[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]}}|}}|[[Category:{{{1}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}}}<noinclude> *This adds a category or dated category to an article space page only. *It will add it to an optional additional category. *If the dated cat is invalid it will add it to [[:Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
Syntax
*Parameter 1: Default category name *Parameter 2: Preposition (from, since, as at, as of) *Parameter 3: Date (Month Year, e.g. {{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}) usually the "date" parameter of the calling template *Parameter 4: All inclusive category name - e.g. All articles containing weasel words *Parameter 5: Alternative default category (overrides 1 which is then only used to construct the dated category if it exists)
==Note== Even if the constructed dated category doesn't exist it is still used. This enables more rapid fault finding.
==See also== {{Tl|DMC}} </noinclude>
Swine flu is caused by having sex with pigs

revision.comment: per request on talk page, please revert if this causes a problem. Thanks!
If not categorising, output a space instead of nothing to prevent unwanted blank lines; see edit request on talk page
Second attempt. Those spaces upset inline templates such as {{As of}}. Instead, try an unconditional <nowiki/>
revision.text:
<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--
-->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]<!--
-->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    |<!--
 -->|[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]<!--
-->}}
  |[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}<!--
            -->|{{{1}}}<!--
           -->}}]]<!--
-->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 18:56:49 on [[Template:Dated maintenance category]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}||[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]}}|}}|[[Category:{{{1}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}}}<noinclude> *This adds a category or dated category to an article space page only. *It will add it to an optional additional category. *If the dated cat is invalid it will add it to [[:Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
Syntax
*Parameter 1: Default category name *Parameter 2: Preposition (from, since, as at, as of) *Parameter 3: Date (Month Year, e.g. {{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}) usually the "date" parameter of the calling template *Parameter 4: All inclusive category name - e.g. All articles containing weasel words *Parameter 5: Alternative default category (overrides 1 which is then only used to construct the dated category if it exists)
==Note== Even if the constructed dated category doesn't exist it is still used. This enables more rapid fault finding.
==See also== {{Tl|DMC}} </noinclude>
Swine flu is caused by having sex with pigs

revision.comment: [[WP:RBK|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Ihateswineflu1|Ihateswineflu1]] ([[User talk:Ihateswineflu1|talk]]) to last version by Rich Farmbrough
per request on talk page, please revert if this causes a problem. Thanks!
If not categorising, output a space instead of nothing to prevent unwanted blank lines; see edit request on talk page
Second attempt. Those spaces upset inline templates such as {{As of}}. Instead, try an unconditional <nowiki/>
revision.text:
<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--

    |<!--
 -->|[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]<!--

Syntax
*Parameter 1: Default category name *Parameter 2: Preposition (from, since, as at, as of) *Parameter 3: Date (Month Year, e.g. {{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}) usually the "date" parameter of the calling template *Parameter 4: All inclusive category name - e.g. All articles containing weasel words *Parameter 5: Alternative default category (overrides 1 which is then only used to construct the dated category if it exists)
==Note== Even if the constructed dated category doesn't exist it is still used. This enables more rapid fault finding.
==See also== {{Tl|DMC}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!-- -->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}} |{{#if:{{{3|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}} |<!-- -->|<!-- -->}} |<!-- -->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}} |}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]] [[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]] [[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}} |{{{5}}}<!-- -->|{{{1}}}<!-- -->}}]] [[Category:{{{4}}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Second attempt. Those spaces upset inline templates such as {{As of}}. Instead, try an unconditional <nowiki/>
revision.text:
<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--
-->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]<!--
-->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    |<!--
 -->|[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]<!--
-->}}
  |[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}<!--
            -->|{{{1}}}<!--
           -->}}]]<!--
-->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--
-->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]<!--
-->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    |<!--
 -->|[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]<!--
-->}}
  |[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}<!--
            -->|{{{1}}}<!--
           -->}}]]<!--
-->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23703150061|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!-- -->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}} |{{#if:{{{3|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}} |<!-- -->|<!-- -->}} |<!-- -->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}} |}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]] [[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]] [[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}} |{{{5}}}<!-- -->|{{{1}}}<!-- -->}}]] [[Category:{{{4}}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--
-->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |<!--
-->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    |<!--
 -->|<!--
-->}}
  |<!--
-->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]
[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}<!--
            -->|{{{1}}}<!--
           -->}}]]
[[Category:{{{4}}}]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dated_maintenance_category here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dated_maintenance_category for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!-- -->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}} |{{#if:{{{3|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}} |<!-- -->|<!-- -->}} |<!-- -->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}} |}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]] [[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]] [[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}} |{{{5}}}<!-- -->|{{{1}}}<!-- -->}}]] [[Category:{{{4}}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Second attempt. Those spaces upset inline templates such as {{As of}}. Instead, try an unconditional <nowiki/>
revision.text:
<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--
-->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]<!--
-->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    |<!--
 -->|[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]<!--
-->}}
  |[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}<!--
            -->|{{{1}}}<!--
           -->}}]]<!--
-->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
revision.text:
<nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles-->{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages|<!--Do not categorize-->|<!--
-->{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]<!--
-->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    |<!--
 -->|[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]<!--
-->}}
  |[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}<!--
            -->|{{{1}}}<!--
           -->}}]]<!--
-->}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<nowiki/>{{#ifeq:{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template messages||{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|0|1}}+{{#ifeq:{{{onlyarticles|no}}}|yes|0|1}}
 |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |[[Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}]]{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1}}} {{{2}}} {{{3}}}
    ||[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]}}
  |[[Category:{{#if:{{{5|}}}
               |{{{5}}}|{{{1}}}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
      |[[Category:{{{4}}}]]}}}}}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
